spoken_transcript: 嗯，我每天早上都會去菜市場買菜。 今天好像忘了帶錢包……欸，應該有放口袋裡。然後去診所拿藥，阿母常叫我準時吃。那個，我記得昨天也來過這裡，對不對？ 哎呀，記不太清楚了。不過回家後還是會煮飯給囝仔吃。

acoustic_condition_info.description: 乾淨近距離錄音，低背景噪音。

generation_notes: CDR 1 mild: Shows word-finding difficulty ('錢包' hesitation), mild repetition of routine, one memory uncertainty (forgetting wallet yesterday vs today). Natural pauses and filler words used sparingly. Mostly coherent daily life description.
